player_notes.ajay mitchell: Ruled out for Game 5 (WCF) with a right calf strain. Rotation minutes will be redistributed among OKC guards.

game_notes.OKC vs SAS: Ajay Mitchell (OKC guard) is out with a calf strain, thinning OKC's backcourt rotation. De'Aaron Fox and Dylan Harper both confirmed available for SAS.
